Name: Designer Pure Crunchy Silk Lehenga Choli With Heavy Moti Embroidery Sequence Work And Cancan Attached Dupatta Set
Description:
Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Lehenga Choli suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Choli)

Fabric & Inner: Crafted from pure Crunchy silk fabric lined with comfortable micro cotton inner material.

Work & Details: Features heavy embroidery moti work beautifully blended with sequence and thread work highlights.

Fit & Style: Offered in a free-size, un-stitched format to allow personalized boutique tailoring.

Bottom (Lehenga)

Fabric & Lining: Made using premium pure Crunchy silk fabric paired with a soft micro cotton inner lining.

Volume & Structure: Designed with an extra-large 9-meter flair layout, complete with an attached canvas patta and cancan to maintain a structured bridal volume.

Fit & Accessories: Comes fully stitched in size 44 and includes an extra matching designer embroidered belt.

Dupatta

Fabric & Size: Made from matching pure Crunchy silk fabric with a total length of 2.30 meters.

Artwork & Embellishments: Detailed with heavy embroidery moti work along with sequence and thread embroidery details.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
Categories: Festive Fits, Lehenga Choli
Attribute 1 value(s): CS, L, M, S, XL, XS, XXL

Elegant Magenta Pink Anarkali Gown Pant Set with Fancy Embroidery Lace Border Dupatta Ethnic Wear for Women
Description:
Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Anarkali)

Neck & Sleeves: Neck: V Neck || Sleeve Length – Full Sleeves || Sleeve Style – Rollup Design & Pattern: Heavy pure blooming Vichitra silk fabric tailored into a striking full-kali pattern with an impressive 3.50 to 3.80-meter volume flare. Intricate Embellishments: Detailed with fancy yoke lace work, paired with full churidar sleeves featuring exquisite embroidery dori, zari, and sequence lace accents. Premium Lining: Stitched with a pure micro-scrape full inner lining for maximum comfort. Length: Anarkali length measures approximately 48 to 49 inches.

Bottom (Pant)

Fabric & Work: Made from matching premium pure blooming Vichitra silk, beautifully accented with fancy coordinating bottom lace work. Fit: Free-size, fully stitched regular-fit trousers designed for effortless comfort.

Dupatta

Style & Dimensions: 2.2-meter shawl-type dupatta with a elegant 25-inch width, making it highly versatile for styling. Artwork: Crafted from pure blooming Vichitra silk fabric embellished with detailed embroidery sequence, dori, and zari work. Borders: Finished beautifully with a premium, fancy lace border layout along the edges.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work. Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent. Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
Categories: Kurtis, Rooted Style

Name: Designer Multi Thread Jari Embroidery Heavy Net Silk Kurti Plazzo With Chain Sequence Work Attached Crepe Inner Dupatta Set
Description:
Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Kurti)

Neck & Sleeves: Neck: Round Neck || Sleeve Length – Full Sleeves || Sleeve Style – Rollup

Fabric & Lining: Made from premium heavy net silk fabric featuring an attached soft crepe inner lining for ultimate comfort.

Work & Details: Extensively detailed with multi-thread and zari embroidery, intricately stitched with chain work and shimmering 3mm sequence accents.

Length & Sizing: Features a maximum length of up to 38 inches and accommodates bust sizes up to 44 inches (XXL).

Bottom (Plazzo)

Fabric & Lining: Crafted from matching premium heavy net silk fabric layered with an attached crepe inner lining.

Design & Embellishments: Detailed with coordinating multi-thread, zari, and 3mm sequence embroidery work.

Dimensions & Fit: Tailored with a maximum length of up to 43 inches and a waist size extending up to 44 inches.

Dupatta

Fabric & Style: Made from lightweight, elegant heavy net silk fabric that drapes effortlessly over the shoulder.

Artwork: Adorned with delicate embroidery stitch work featuring multi-thread, zari, and 3mm sequence highlights to complement the complete outfit.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
Categories: Party Wear, The Elite Collection
Attribute 1 value(s): CS, L, M, S, XL, XS, XXL
